prePhase74ReferenceDefaults.note: Historical runner defaults before Phase 74 code change (for delta context in audits).

methodology.signal: marketEdgeFair (trueProb − fairProbChosenSide) — same as Phase 73 gating; no naive metrics.
methodology.ppSimulation: Sequential stages minEdge → minLegEv → adjustedEv on marketEdgeFair; then FCFS player cap (max 1 per player, CSV order).
methodology.udSimulation: Standard-path UD filter: marketEdgeFair >= udMinEdge && marketEdgeFair >= standardPickMinLegEv (matches Phase 72 CSV diagnosis; boosted pick factor path not in CSV).

recommended.rationale: PP goal not reachable with current CSV pool at any T; apply conservative -0.005 effective EV step (and align minLegEv) to improve marginal pass-through — rerun merge for ≥6 legs.
Set udMinEdge so max(udMinEdge, standardPickMinLegEv) matches minimal T* for goal leg count (standard-path simulation).

riskAssessment.pp: Lowering effective EV / combined floor increases tail inclusion; prefer smallest T* or smallest eff reduction that clears PP_MIN_ELIGIBLE_LEGS_FOR_CARD_BUILD.
riskAssessment.ud: Lowering udMinEdge raises false-positive rate vs market; verify with tracker CLV after deploy.
riskAssessment.data: If prizepicks-legs.csv has fewer than 6 legs, no threshold can unlock PP card build — merge/source issue.
